raw_source.title: [远程] AltLayer 公司诚聘 全栈（偏前端）开发工程师 薪水 5000-8000（或面议） USD
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
AltLayer 成立于 2021 年，是一个去中心化协议，有助于启动使用 native 和 restake 的形式启动 optimistic 和 zk rollup stack。我们的解决方案在每个级别（sequencing、execution 和 verification）上都增强了链上功能。
基于此协议构建的 AltLayer 还提供无代码汇总即服务 (RaaS) Dashboard，任何人只需单击几下即可在 2 分钟内启动自定义 rollup。RaaS 启动板专为多链和多 VM 世界而设计。它支持不同的汇总 SDK，例如 OP Stack、Arbitrum Orbit、Linea、Polygon zkEVM CDK 和 Starkware 等。
AltLayer 产品得到了以太坊 Arbitrum、Optimism、EigenLayer、Polygon、Polychain Capital、Breyer Capital、Messari、Jump 等顶级行业建设者、风险投资家和研究人员的认可。
基于模块化区块链精神的宗旨，我们梦想建立一个可以让数十万个汇总蓬勃发展的生态系统，为无限的应用和大规模采用打开闸门。

## 薪资福利待遇
5000-8000（或面议） USD / 月

## 地点

- 工作地点：远程
- 联系方式：[hiring@altlayer.io](mailto:hiring@altlayer.io)

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：全职
- 是否远程：远程

## 岗位要求、职责

### Requirements
* Over 3 years of experience of proven full stack web development with TypeScript, and/or Node.js. Go and Rust is a plus.
* Experience in using front-end frameworks such as CRA, Next.js, Vue, Vite, or Svelte.
* Experience in using front-end libraries such as React, React Native, Redux, React Query, Material UI, or Tailwind CSS.
* Experience in using web3 libraries such as web3-react, ethers.js, wagmi, or viem.
* Familiarity with open-source development and collaborations.
* Strong problem-solving and communication skills.
* Knowledge and experience of Test-Driven Development.
* Experience in blockchain and web3 technologies is a plus.

### Responsibilities
* Develop intuitive and responsive user interfaces
* Develop secure, highly available and scalable microservices e.g. relayer and/or full-fledged decentralized applications.
* Collaborate with DevOps and smart contract developer team members to plan projects.
* Perform continuous improvements, such as suggesting architecture and workflow enhancements.
* Perform design reviews and code reviews regularly.
* Create technical specifications and documentation.

## 工作环境
AltLayer 一直保持浓厚的工程师文化和 geek 氛围，注重人才的发展，鼓励技术分享，坚持 “小而美”。全员 remote work 多年，看重结果而非形式，为共同创业的小伙伴们创造了一个充满自由、尊重和信任的工作环境。

## 薪资福利待遇 5000-8000（或面议） USD / 月
- 工作地点：远程 - 联系方式：[hiring@altlayer.io](mailto:hiring@altlayer.io)

### Requirements * Over 3 years of experience of proven full stack web development with TypeScript, and/or Node.js. Go and Rust is a plus. * Experience in using front-end frameworks such as CRA, Next.js, Vue, Vite, or Svelte. * Experience in using front-end libraries such as React, React Native, Redux, React Query, Material UI, or Tailwind CSS. * Experience in using web3 libraries such as web3-react, ethers.js, wagmi, or viem. * Familiarity with open-source development and collaborations. * Strong problem-solving and communication skills. * Knowledge and experience of Test-Driven Development. * Experience in blockchain and web3 technologies is a plus.
